description: CTA / Lev Fund trend exhaustion in equity index futures (ES+NQ+RTY+YM). CFTC TFF 156w pctile + z-score + 4w change. CTA_MAX_LONG (unwind, short) or CTA_MAX_SHORT (cover rally, long). Moskowitz-Ooi-Pedersen 2012. ~58%/+-3-7%/2-4wk. Weekly Tue 23 UTC.
